title: See Tasks worked on a day
excerpt: Hello! I am currently using the time tracking widget to see all the time I tracked for a single day. After a workday I can see the complete time I worked on a special board. Is there a possibility to see all Tasks I work…

posts.author: mdiebels (Matthias Diebels)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! I am currently using the time tracking widget to see all the time I tracked for a single day. After a workday I can see the complete time I worked on a special board. Is there a possibility to see all Tasks I worked on? So instead of “Project A”: “MyName: 2h” it should be “Project A”: “Task A: 1h”, “Task B: 1h”?

Thank you!
